summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of AICardSection integration from 'kaesten' repository. All 5 animated cards successfully integrated with proper animations, glow effects, and responsive layout. Hero section maintains original content with subtle background improvements.
passed_tests: AICardSection displays with all 5 cards (Chatbots, KI-Agenten, KI-Telefonagenten, Workflow-Automatisierung, Softwares und Tools)
Card-enter animations work on scroll with proper staggered delays
Glow border animations function on input fields and buttons
Chart draw animation works in Workflow-Automatisierung card
Tool icons float animation works in Softwares und Tools card (20 icons)
Hero section displays with subtle background glow
Hero text content unchanged (Mehr Effizienz. Weniger Kosten.)
Hero buttons work correctly (cal.com link and scroll to #fallstudien)
Responsive layout adapts properly on mobile viewport
Wave bar animations in telefon card (12 bars)
Ambient background animation in tools card
Platform cards with staggered animations in KI-Agenten card
Card hover effects and group hover functionality
